texto: Galloway pursed his lips and then gave a sly smirk. “I’ll admit I didn’t foresee this. You have become a prominent foe. I apologize for ridiculing you.”“I accept your apology.”“Good. Now it’s time to die.” “Are you ready old man?”Galloway sputtered out a laugh. “Oh yes.”“Then let’s end this.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de T.C. Harrison que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “Galloway pursed his lips and then gave a sly smirk. “I’ll admit I didn’t foresee this.
